creator: vegeta@tuxpowered.net
text: *if* we're aiming for symmetry with block rules. I am unsure if we really should. I usually tend to initially create very universal and highly configurable solutions which break all compatibility only to learn that nobody, even me included, needs such thing. Maybe we can agree on a simpler thing, that is adding "set pass-fail-policy [drop|return]"? That would be a bit more configurable than following block-policy but less invasive than per-rule setting.
